name: qeli
desc: Self-hosted, censorship-resistant VPN with REALITY / anti-DPI obfuscation and post-quantum (X25519 + ML-KEM-768) crypto. Rust core + native Android/Windows/mac…
descFull: Self-hosted, censorship-resistant VPN with REALITY / anti-DPI obfuscation and post-quantum (X25519 + ML-KEM-768) crypto. Rust core + native Android/Windows/macOS clients. Works on networks with active DPI (Iran, China, Russia).
